_readme: Edit 'activePreset' to switch all agents at once. Run 'node .claude/scripts/apply-models.mjs' to apply. For a one-off run, pass --preset=<name> to the script instead.

budget.description: Lower-cost models across the board. Best for exploration, prototyping, and simple tasks where speed matters more than depth.

balanced.description: Default. High-volume agents (coder, tester, requirements) use Sonnet. High-stakes reasoning (architect, reviewer, security) uses Opus. Best for day-to-day development.

quality.description: Opus everywhere. Maximum reasoning depth. Best for critical features, complex architecture, or security-sensitive work where cost is secondary.

overrides._comment: Optional per-agent overrides applied on top of the active preset. Useful for temporarily upgrading one agent without changing the preset. Set a value to null to remove an override.
overrides._example_usage: To run the coder at Opus quality temporarily: set { "coder": "claude-opus-4-6" } here, run apply-models.mjs, then remove after.
